# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

// Import the necessary modules in TypeScript
import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.156.0/http/server.ts";  // Serve module provides HTTP server capabilities with Deno runtime API compatible version, ie., it's based on Node.js http package by the same author as TypeScript
import { openKv } from "https://deno.land/x/deno_kv@12.0.3-alpha8/mod.ts"; // This is a custom module that interact with Deno's KV system in convenient way like 'open', and works based on the same author as TypeScript
import { urlencoded } from "https://deno.land/x/koa@v1.0.2-rc4+node_15.ts"; // Importing koa for request handling, similar to express in NodeJS 
                                        --> KOA: Express like middleware designed with simplicity and speed as the goal's primary aim - bringing another layer of complexity but a lot closer than other frameworks do by making it easy & fast (by Deno Deploy team) using JavaScript only. You can also add your own routing functionality, which is more advanced
import { Application } from "https://deno.land/x/koa@v1.0.2-rc4+node_15"; // Importing koa for request handling in TypeScript --> KOA: Express like middleware designed with simplicity and speed as the goal's primary aim - bringing another layer of complexity but a lot closer than other frameworks do by making it easy & fast (by Deno Deploy team) using JavaScript only.
import { readable } from "https://deno.land/std@0.156.0/streams/mod.ts"; // This is for reading response body in koa middleware  --> similar to express' built-in, but works based on the same author as TypeScript
import { DenolandResponse } from "https://deno.land/x/dnl@v0.52.1684793"; // Importing dnl for handling response in koa middleware --> Similar to express's res, but it works with the denoserver or your custom application context
import { Handler } from "https://deno.land/x/lambda@0.21.5+build-493687dfbcfcceec"; // Importing lambda handler for Denoland deployment  --> Similar to express's handling requests in the server
import { readFileSync } from "https://deno.land/std@0.120.0/fs/mod.ts";// To handle static files by Koa middleware, use this code like denoserver is using it as well --> Importing module for Denoland deployment
import { resolvePaths } from "https://deno.land/std@0.125.0/_deps_jsxp/mod.ts"; // To load dynamic files in your app, use this function similar to express' 'resolve', it works based on same author as TypeScript
import { NError /* Note: This import is not included here due that its name seems ambiguous and may be used for different purposes */} from "https://deno.land/x/macori@v0.23.14-alpha67+node_89eebe5fbaeabcbfdcdafcdeaecbefdab """// Importing macaro on error handling --> Similar to express's 'error handler', but works with the denoserver or your custom application context
import { Context } from "https://deno.land/x/lambda@0.21.5+build-493687dfbcfcceec"; // Importing lambda for Denoland deployment  --> Similar to express's 'context', but it works with the denoserver or your custom application context
import { getBody } from "https://deno.land/x/_deps_koa@v1295e8f403c76bcfdbfbbecfebcabccedi#getbody"; // To extract request body in koa middleware, use this code
import { parseBody } from "https://deno.land/x/_deps_koa@v1295e8f403c76bcfdbfbbecfebcabccedi#parsebody"; // To extract request body in koa middleware, use this code
import { redirect } from "https://deno.land/x/_deps_koa@v1295e8f403c76bcfdbfbbecfebcabccedi#redirect"; // To perform redirection in koa middleware, use this code
import { ServerResponse } from "https://deno.land/x/_deps_koa@v1295e8f403c76bcfdbfbbecfebcabccedi#respond"; // Importing respond in Koa middleware --> Similar to express's res, but it works with the denoserver or your custom application context
import { ServerRequest } from "https://deno.land/x/_deps_koa@v1295e8f403c76bcfdbfbbecfebcabccedi#request"; // Importing request in Koa middleware --> Similar to express's req, but it works with the denoserver or your custom application context
import { Middleware } from "https://deno.land/x/_deps_koa@v1295e8f403c76bcfdbfbbecfebcabccedi#middlewares"; // Importing middle ware in Koa --> Similar to express's use, but it works with the denoserver or your custom application context
import { DenoDeployResponse } from "https://deno.land/x/_deps_dnl@v0.521684793+build-cddceeebfdbcfdcb"; // Importing dnl for handling response in koa middleware --> Similar to express's res, but it works with the denoserver or your custom application context
import { getRouteParams } from "https://deno.land/x/_deps_koa@v1295e8f403c76bcfdbfbbecfebcabccedi#getrouteparams"; // To load dynamic files in your app, use this function similar to express' 'params', it works based on same author as TypeScript
import { send } from "https://deno.land/std@0.125.0/_deps_koa__middlewares#respondwithjson"; // To respond with JSON in Koa middleware, use this code similar to express's 'response', but it works based on the same author as TypeScript
import { parseParams } from "https://deno.land/x/_deps_koa@v1295e8f403c76bcfdbfbbecfebcabccedi#parseparams"; // To load dynamic files in your app, use this function similar to express' 'query', it works based on same author as TypeScript
import { redirect } from "https://deno.land/x/_deps_koa@v1295e8f403c76bcfdbfbbecfebcabccedi#redirect"; // To perform redirection in koa middleware, use this code
